mainEntity.name: Denied comp for mental health from work injury West Jordan?
mainEntity.text: Denied comp for mental health from work injury West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covered if physical injury causes mental; prove causation with psych eval.

suggestedAnswer.text: West Jordan: PTSD/anxiety post-physical trauma compensable. Insurers deny psych claims; specialist reports + lawyer overturn most.

name: Mental Health Comp West Jordan
description: Covered if physical injury causes mental; prove causation with psych eval.
